author_identification.canonical_name_ar: محمد بن عبد الله بن مالك الطائي الجياني، أبو عبد الله، جمال الدين
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Prominent grammarian and linguist, author of the renowned Alfiyyah in grammar.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: Part of Ibn Malik's linguistic works focusing on morphology.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Contributes to the understanding of Arabic morphology and complements Ibn Malik's other works.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: The editor is known for his work on Ibn Malik's linguistic corpus.
scholarly_context.tahqiq_methodology_note: Includes a detailed study of the author and the work, with a focus on manuscript description and critical apparatus.
